name: Loop pressure root
status_or_admission_boundary: Architecture only; no coefficient admitted by this expression.
writer_use: Use to introduce the reduced-loop pressure problem.

name: Buoyancy drive
plain_meaning: Buoyancy head integrated around the loop using the chosen property lane.
status_or_admission_boundary: Property lane must be labeled before fitting or scoring.
writer_use: Use to explain why temperature/property choices affect pressure closure.

name: Pressure loss sum
plain_meaning: Segment-local distributed and local pressure-loss model slots.
status_or_admission_boundary: Symbols f_i and K_i are slots; current recirculating corner/upcomer evidence does not admit ordinary component coefficients.
writer_use: Use with explicit caveat that notation is not admission.

name: Pressure decomposition
latex_form: \Delta p_{\mathrm{static}}=\Delta p_{\mathrm{hyd}}+\Delta p_{\mathrm{kin}}+\Delta p_{\mathrm{dist,dev}}+\Delta p_{\mathrm{section/cluster}}+\Delta p_{\mathrm{transient}}+\Delta p_{\mathrm{res}}
plain_meaning: Diagnostic pressure-basis decomposition separating hydrostatic, kinetic, developing, section/cluster, transient, and residual terms.
status_or_admission_boundary: Diagnostic decomposition; component K/F6 admission remains gated.
writer_use: Use for pressure-basis ladder and negative pressure results.

name: Differential fluid energy balance
plain_meaning: Steady segment energy equation along loop coordinate s.
status_or_admission_boundary: Steady model form; residual ownership/admission handled separately.
writer_use: Use in model-form chapter and glossary.

name: Finite segment energy ledger
plain_meaning: Finite control-volume heat ledger for one segment.
status_or_admission_boundary: Q_residual is an accounting lane, not a closure.
writer_use: Use to explain heat-path attribution before fitting.

name: Expanded segment thermal ledger
plain_meaning: Thermal ledger separating heater, cooler, passive wall, test-section, junction, and residual owners.
status_or_admission_boundary: Bookkeeping form; residual cannot be silently absorbed into Nu.
writer_use: Use for Chapter 7 thermal residual-owner evidence.

name: Wall-loss resistance form
plain_meaning: Compact passive wall/external boundary resistance path.
status_or_admission_boundary: Drive temperature and resistance owners must be named; realized CFD wallHeatFlux is not a predictive runtime input.
writer_use: Use for wall/external boundary model form.

name: Test-section source/loss slot
status_or_admission_boundary: Term may have either sign; source-side accounting is pending unless admitted by later gate.
writer_use: Use to prevent hiding test-section behavior inside passive heat loss.

name: Heat-path balance ledger
plain_meaning: Current heat-path attribution ledger used in reduction evidence.
writer_use: Use in evidence/result descriptions when distinguishing heat-path owners.

name: Dynamic pressure basis
plain_meaning: Pressure-loss velocity basis for segment i.
status_or_admission_boundary: Velocity basis must match pressure planes and reduction basis before K admission.

name: Throughflow-plus-exchange variables
plain_meaning: Named variable contract for future upcomer exchange-cell model.
status_or_admission_boundary: Diagnostic/blocked until production harvest, same-QOI UQ, source/property, and admission gates pass.
writer_use: Use as future model-form vocabulary, not admitted closure.
